_calibration: CALIBRATION FIXTURE (known-bad, deliberately committed): polarity-inverted rule class. This is a prohibit-style rule whose regex matches the COMPLIANT wording - it fires a breach exactly when the site declares it obtains consent before setting cookies, i.e. when the site is doing the right thing. The catalogue polarity linter MUST flag this rule in --calibrate mode, or it has not earned its zero.
regex_pattern: we (ask for|obtain) your consent before (setting|placing)( any)? cookies
breach_message: Cookies are set without user consent
